name: ExtensionVerificationResult_Status
title: R5: attested | validated | in-process | req-revalid | val-fail | reval-fail | entered-in-error
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `VerificationResult.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`VerificationResult.status` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `VerificationResult.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `VerificationResult.status` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `VerificationResult.status` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `VerificationResult.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `VerificationResult.status` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: attested | validated | in-process | req-revalid | val-fail | reval-fail | entered-in-error
element.comment: Element `VerificationResult.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `VerificationResult.status` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: attested | validated | in-process | req-revalid | val-fail | reval-fail | entered-in-error
element.definition: The validation status of the target (attested; validated; in process; requires revalidation; validation failed; revalidation failed).

binding.description: The validation status of the target.
